title: Crispy Meditteranean Keto Fritters
description: A crispy, cheesy fritter recipe that's perfect for a keto diet. Made with mediterranean cheese and baked to perfection.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, combine the Emmentaler cheese and Mediterranean cheese.
3. Add the chopped parsley and crumbled bacon to the cheese mixture.
4. Mix well until all the ingredients are fully incorporated.
5. Using your hands, shape the mixture into 8-10 small fritters.
6. Place the fritters on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake the fritters in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
